title: Parkio Daily for July 12, 2026
teaser: Fort Wilderness debuts a new pool area; Magic Kingdom lightning strike closed rides last week; Space Mountain reimagining rumored.

bignews.title: Fort Wilderness unveils new pool area and refreshed lobby
bignews.body: Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground has completed a refresh including a redesigned pool area and updated lobby. The enhancements add more recreational space to the 750-acre wooded resort.

parkioInsight.text: The new pool area tends to be less crowded in late afternoon. Guests staying at Fort Wilderness may find the refreshed spaces offer a quieter escape after mid-park days.

bignews.title: Lightning strike hit Magic Kingdom building during storm last week
bignews.body: A lightning bolt reportedly struck a Fantasyland building at Magic Kingdom during severe weather on July 5, briefly forcing ride closures and sending guests to shelter. Video captured the moment of impact.

parkioInsight.text: Summer afternoon thunderstorms usually arrive between 2pm and 5pm. Plan indoor attractions or dining during that window to avoid evacuation delays.

bignews.title: Space Mountain reimagining rumored ahead of D23 Expo
bignews.body: Industry chatter suggests a major rebuild of Space Mountain at Magic Kingdom may be announced at D23 Expo next month. The project would likely involve retracking and significant interior updates.

parkioInsight.text: If the closure is confirmed at D23, riders may have only a few months left. Knock out Space Mountain during morning Extra Magic Hours while the announcement is still unconfirmed.

bignews.title: New Moana-themed drink debuts at EPCOT
bignews.body: A new Moana-inspired beverage is now available at EPCOT, tying in with the live-action film's theatrical run. The drink costs seven dollars and has drawn positive early reviews.

parkioInsight.text: Festival kiosks tend to sell out of specialty drinks by early evening. Stop by World Showcase before 4pm to try the new Moana beverage while supply lasts.

topstories.title: Star View Station at Disneyland closing for multi-month refurbishment
topstories.body: The Tomorrowland lounge and meet-and-greet space at Disneyland will close for an extended refurbishment. No reopening timeline has been announced.

parkioInsight.text: Families with young children often use Star View Station as a quiet break spot. Plan alternative rest areas like the Hungry Bear patio or Main Street Opera House during the closure.

topstories.title: Rebecca Hook launching Ghost Mickey necklace at Disneyland trunk show
topstories.body: Designer Rebecca Hook will debut a new Ghost Mickey necklace at a trunk show running July 17-19 at the Emporium on Main Street, U.S.A. The piece is expected to be available park-wide shortly after.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition trunk show releases often sell out within the first few hours. Arrive at the Emporium before 10am on opening day for the best selection.

topstories.title: Wait times dropped unexpectedly during Fourth of July week
topstories.body: Disney World saw lighter-than-expected crowds during the Independence Day holiday period, with average wait times lower than typical summer weeks. Multiple parks experienced walk-on windows.

parkioInsight.text: Mid-July weekdays often stay quieter than expected after holiday visitors leave. Today and Monday may offer shorter lines before summer crowds return next weekend.

topstories.title: Jonas Brothers announced for D23 Expo performance
topstories.body: The Jonas Brothers will perform at D23: The Ultimate Disney Fan Event next month. The band joins an expanding lineup of entertainment for the biennial convention.

parkioInsight.text: D23 Expo weekend in August usually draws heavy crowds to Anaheim hotels and Disneyland Resort. Book dining reservations and Lightning Lane selections well in advance if visiting that week.

topstories.title: Dogs now allowed at select Disney restaurant patios
topstories.body: One Disney resort has updated pet policies to permit dogs at five restaurant outdoor seating areas starting this week. The change applies only to designated patio zones.

parkioInsight.text: Guests traveling with service animals may find the expanded seating options helpful during peak meal times. Call ahead to confirm availability at your preferred location.

topstories.title: Moana Urupocha-Chan plush collection available online
topstories.body: A full line of Moana character plushes in the Urupocha-Chan style has arrived at the Disney Store online. The collection includes Pua, Tamatoa, and Kakamora figures previously sold only in parks.

parkioInsight.text: Popular plush releases often sell out online within days. Ordering before Monday typically ensures stock before the weekend rush hits.

topstories.title: Live-action Moana opens softly with 18 million on first day
topstories.body: The new live-action Moana film earned 18 million dollars on opening day, including previews, marking a slower start than recent Disney remakes. The adaptation features Dwayne Johnson reprising his voice role in live action.

parkioInsight.text: Moana character meet-and-greets may see lighter demand than anticipated if box office trends continue. Today's wait for the Adventureland meet is likely under 30 minutes.

icymi.title: Disney remembers Imagineer Don Iwerks
icymi.body: The Walt Disney Company paid tribute to Disney Legend Don Iwerks, son of animation pioneer Ub Iwerks, who contributed decades of technical innovation to theme parks and film.

icymi.title: Customizable crystal castles debut at Disneyland
icymi.body: Arribas Brothers at Cristal d'Orleans now offers hollow crystal Sleeping Beauty Castle figures that guests can fill with custom beads for 59 dollars. A Remy ornament also launched.

icymi.title: Delta introduces Basic Business seating tier
icymi.body: Delta Airlines has added a new Basic Business fare class with restricted benefits. The change may affect guests flying to Orlando or Southern California for park visits.

icymi.title: Disney surveys guests on expanded DVC perks
icymi.body: Disney Vacation Club is testing interest in enhanced Membership Magic Beyond benefits, including potential dining discounts, lounge access, and exclusive character experiences at both resorts.

spotlight.title: Disney Celebrates America kicks off with 250th anniversary events
spotlight.body: The Walt Disney Company has announced Disney Celebrates America, a multi-month initiative honoring the nation's 250th anniversary from Veterans Day 2025 through July 4, 2026. The program includes park entertainment, storytelling, and special tributes across domestic properties.
spotlight.ctaLabel: Learn more on Disney Parks Blog

parkioInsight.text: Patriotic-themed entertainment and limited-time food offerings tend to appear during the finale week. Plan a visit around July 4 weekend for the fullest celebration experience.
